title: The-DiscordRPC
description: Adding Discord Rich Presence to Minecraft with Backend & Easy setup.
body:
# The Discord Rich Presence
Adding Discord Rich Presence to Minecraft with Backend & Easy setup.


<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>

Minecraft `>=1.20.1`

Fabric Loader `>=0.15.11`

Fabric API `>=0.92.1+1.20.1`

</details>

## Java-Discord-RPC
[java-discord-rpc](https://github.com/MinnDevelopment/java-discord-rpc/)

## Setup
[java-discord-rpc](https://github.com/MinnDevelopment/java-discord-rpc/?tab=readme-ov-file#setup)

## Backend Use ?

[Discord Developer](https://discord.com/developers/applications)
New Application > Create an application
- Application ID
- rich-presence/assets > upload image to showing
- copy name befor setup into backend index.js
## Contributing
Feel free to contribute to this project as it's available under the MIT license. Find any issues or have a suggestion, report it on [Github](https://github.com/PPekKunGz/DiscordRPC-PP)!
